nasb.text: There is nothing reliable in what they say; Their inward part is destruction itself. Their throat is an open grave; They flatter with their tongue.

esv.text: For there is no truth in their mouth; their inmost self is destruction; their throat is an open grave; they flatter with their tongue.

cnv.text: 因為他們的口裡沒有真話， 他們的內心充滿毀滅人的意圖， 他們的喉嚨是敞開的墳墓， 他們用舌頭弄詭詐。

ccb.text: 他们口中毫无实话， 心里充满恶毒， 喉咙是敞开的坟墓， 舌头上尽是诡诈。

csbs.text: 因为他们口中的话不可信， 他们里面都是奸恶， 他们的喉咙是敞开的坟墓， 他们用舌头谄媚人。
